codeReview.summary: Feature implemented correctly with proper flakiness scoring, quarantine threshold of 0.1, and 10-run stability loop. Tests verify all required behaviors. Three minor non-blocking observations: unused fields in QuarantineConfig and an unused parameter.

issues.description: exit_threshold field in QuarantineConfig is set to 0.1 but never used in should_release() - the stability_loop_runs mechanism is the sole release criteria. This is dead code but not harmful.
consecutive_passes_to_exit field in QuarantineConfig (default 3) is set but never read - stability_loop_runs (default 10) is used instead. Dead code.

_current_score parameter in should_release() is unused (prefixed with underscore). The release decision is based solely on consecutive_passes >= stability_loop_runs, ignoring the current flakiness score.

summary: Feature val-flakiness-scoring passes review. The implementation correctly: (1) tracks historical pass/fail results via FlakinessDetector/FlakinessHistory, (2) uses a 0.1 quarantine threshold (changed from 0.4), (3) implements 10-run stability loops where any failure resets the count, and (4) restores tests only after 10 consecutive passes. All verification tests pass (48 flakiness tests). No blocking issues found.
